name: world-for-broes
install_doc: git clone https://github.com/Jarandjar/world-for-broes.git && cd world-for-broes && pip install -r requirements.txt && export OPENAI_API_KEY=<key> && docker run -p 6333:6333 -v ./qdrant_storage:/qdrant/storage qdrant/qdrant
notes: RAG-based context injection for GPT/Codex (not Claude Code). Pre-generates ~1k-token subsystem markdown summaries via agent_context_distiller.py, stores them in DuckDB+Qdrant, then retrieves and prepends relevant chunks to prompts via a custom CodexClient wrapper. This is cache-BREAKING: it rewrites input prompts with dynamically retrieved context, invalidating the KV-cache prefix each time the retrieved chunk set changes. Targets OpenAI Codex / GPT-5.1 only; no hooks, no MCP, no Claude Code integration. Mechanism is pre-call retrieval augmentation, not output compaction.
